calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Petitioner, Clarissa M. Johnston the Guardian ad litem present in pro per for the minor, Jose Manuel Johnston, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Teodoro Jose Johnston.
Decree signed in open court.
